name: Mandarin Salad with Tempeh
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Pepper, cayenne, or to taste
4 cups Greens, mixed salad such as:
1 cup Canned mandarin Oranges, slices, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a shallow pan. Set aside.
2. Cut tempeh into strips about 2 inches long and 1/2 inch wide. Steam for 20 minutes. Drain well, then add to marinade. Cover and refrigerate, basting tempeh with marinade occasionally.
3. In a large salad bowl, toss together greens, carrot, mushrooms, and orange slices.
4. Strain marinade from tempeh into a separate bowl. Toss tempeh with the salad.
5. Stir yogurt into the marinade, adding more for a creamier texture; taste for seasoning. Toss with the salad.
6. Serves 6.
Variation: For a lovely presentation, garnish the perimeter of the serving dish with slices of cooked beets.
Per serving: 235 cal; 15g prot; 5g fat; 31g carb; 0.1mg chol; 428mg sod; 6g fiber.
From Vegetarian Times Magazine 7/93 Page 30 "Low-fat Kitchen" by Mary Carroll Formatted to MM by J.Duckett (Kat)
